description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 10.

Legendary Tiers of Play

A Legendary Campaign is separated into three Legendary Tiers of play. Each of these tiers is a magnitude greater than the last, with a pronounced difference in power level between them.

Challenge Rating on our Legendary Foes has been replaced by a Recommended Level, ranging from 20th to 25th. These correspond to each of the three tiers; Legend (20th - 21st), Paragon (22nd - 23rd), or Ascended (24th - 25th). Each tier is of great importance when building a Legendary Campaign, and using all three properly creates a believable power scaling structure, even beyond the heights of 20th level.

Gameplay-wise, each Legendary Tier is a mighty jump from the last, increasing the Legendary Points of both players and foes. This means a Paragon-level stat block is intended to contend with 4-5 characters with 2 Legendary Points each, which gives them access to many more resources than a Legend-level party might possess.

LP

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
